def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
    n = nums.length
    max_idx = n - 1
    sieve = Array.new(n) { true }
    sieve[0] = false
    sieve[1] = false
    for i in 2..max_idx do
        if sieve[i]
            for j in (i * i)..max_idx by i do
                sieve[j] = false
            end
        end
    end
    sumA = 0
    sumB = 0
    for i in 0..n-1 do
        if sieve[i]
            sumA += nums[i]
        else
            sumB += nums[i]
        end
    end
    return (sumA - sumB).abs
end
```
